reviews: Finally found a salon that truly listens. Every visit feels like self-care, not just a haircut.
Pure luxury from start to finish. My stylist understood exactly what I wanted and delivered perfection.
I've been to dozens of salons and this one is by far the best. The attention to detail is remarkable.
description: Salon Dulay - Dr. Phillips is a sanctuary for self-care and style. Our expert stylists combine artistry with the finest products to create looks that are uniquely you. Experience beauty at its finest.
